recommendations:
Karan Arora

"One of the best" is the phrase that comes to mind when I think about Gaurav. Ive had the pleasure of knowing Gaurav for about 2 years, during which he was handling our company as a client . Above all, I was impressed with his ability to be a solution provider and always had a proactive approach.

Sameer Wahie

Gaurav has been and continues to be a great mentor to me. He is a 'Sales Ninja and a great People Manager with a very sharp business acumen. What separates him from others is his ability to push the team beyond their potential and in the process discover their true potential. He is a great example of 'Optimistic leadership with a zeal so strong that he charges the whole ecosystem with it. Would be a privilege to work with him again.Thanks for mentoring me always..!!
